This game is really fun there is just two bad things. The first one is that when you go into huge mountains it’s hard to get back to the forest so they should make the hole a little lower and the second bad thing they have to fix the swimming but everything else is really good.

Game is great cosmetics 🔥 community 🔥 discord🔥, I like the game and the fact that you can actually level up and do different modes, instead of it just being more tag, I love the variety , the hotel IS PRICEY, but I would get Snowy! If I wanted a good independent developer game, with an amazing community, Thank you
